sentences.text: However, he went on bravely, and at last he reached the market.
After he waited some time, he sold the flour for a good price, and then he went home quickly because he was afraid of meeting robbers.
'It was a hard day,' said little Hans as he went to bed, 'but I am glad I helped the Miller because he is my best friend, and he will give me his wheelbarrow.'
Early the next morning, the Miller came to get money for his flour, but little Hans was still in bed because he was very tired.
